title: Service entrypoint contract
verified_behaviors: Binds RP00.P02.M03.S01 to Hermes Validation Service entrypoint contract
Consumes M00 S03 allow_metadata_only tenant-boundary result shape only
Requires upstream M00 S01/S02/S03 and RP00.P02.M02.S11 lock acquisition rule dependencies
Declares TEN-001 through TEN-008 primary implementation anchors
Declares command, Hermes gate, requirement trace, tenant lifecycle, Claude review, human approval, and blocked claim validation contexts
Exports policy, service module, getter, validator, fixture, README, and contract surfaces
Rejects contract drift in subphase, source, title, entrypoint, upstream dependency, context, trace, schema, acceptance gates, boundary flags, and next-subphase fields
Does not create runtime routes or execute service logic
Does not mutate tenant lifecycle state
Does not run Hermes validation or create Hermes evidence as product runtime behavior
Does not use real data or write product state
Hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S02 Request normalization
human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: No human approval is required for this deterministic synthetic metadata-only control-plane subphase; explicit next boundary is RP00.P02.M03.S02 Request normalization.
